element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Starting weapon for resource management learning
Slow-moving ranged enemies, teaches basic threat recognition
Melee and magical attackers, escalates difficulty from possessed humans
More powerful crowd control, discovered as pickup
High-risk melee weapon for resource conservation
Most powerful weapon, rare ammunition, boss-fight tool
Gating mechanism for progression and exploration
Temporary advantage tools for managing difficult encounters
Situational protective gear for hazard navigation
Culminating challenge requiring mastery of all learned mechanics

typical_relief_triggers: Cleared room with no remaining enemies
Reaching safe area after hazard passage
typical_tension_triggers: Entering new area with unknown threats
Navigating hazardous environment (toxic waste, crushing ceilings)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based tension cycles; enemy encounters create localized pressure spikes followed by exploration/resource gathering phases; escalates from start to end of episode with boss finale

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Side passages and alcoves off main path; optional weapon/ammo caches
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden walls and secret rooms discoverable by exploring boundaries; often contain high-value pickups

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction with single enemies and basic threats; teaches movement and basic combat in Episode 1 opening levels
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating enemy density and introduction of tougher demon types; more complex layouts with hazards; better weapons become available
difficulty_curve.late_game: High enemy density with mixed demon types; boss encounters require weapon mastery and tactical positioning; Episode 3 (Hell) represents final difficulty peak
notable_spikes: First encounter with new enemy type
Late-episode levels with mixed demon swarms

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Large Open Arena with Multiple Spawns
notable_level_patterns.description: Wide spaces where enemies appear from multiple angles; teaches awareness and positioning; often paired with power-up placement to incentivize forward movement
Complex interconnected rooms requiring navigation to locate exit; encourages exploration for supplies while creating disorientation pressure
Sequences of toxic waste pits and crushing ceilings requiring precise timed movement; teaches environmental navigation separate from combat
Large arena with single significant enemy; requires weapon efficiency and positioning mastery; episode finales
Locked doors gating progression; requires backtracking to locate colored keycards in preceding areas
